experiment: PR#245 cycle-4: captured verify-step sweep (g_d fork, build-side)
method: num_spec sweep via manifest SPECULATIVE_CONFIG; STEPTIME=1 (CUDA-event probe). exec=execute_model GPU (target verify+sample+accept); propose is OUTSIDE execute_model in this wheel, so exec IS the verify step (NOT exec-draft). qq_bias mask is sub-us, so linear-(M-1) captured step == M-node tree verify captured step (compute-identical).
capture: FULL decode CUDA graph captured (1/1) every run; max_cudagraph_capture_size auto-scales to 2*(num_spec+1): 16/24/28/32. The M=16 verify (query_len=16) captures cleanly at num_spec>=15 -> LONG-POLE-1 SOLVED (the size-29 crash was the num_spec=7/cap-16 static buffers overflowing at 16 rows; sizing buffers for query_len=16 removes it).
vram_note: weights 8.85 GiB + KV pool ~9.46 GiB (~376,880 tokens); well under 24 GB

interpretation.verify_compute_roofline: verify-row growth +15.4% M8->M32 matches denken#257 central +16% compute-bound roofline (shape confirmed from the build side).
interpretation.absolute_scale_gap: local full verify forward ~8.06 ms (A10G, weight-streaming-dominated, intercept 7.69 ms) is ~7x the relayed [1.12,1.43] ms built-step band; cannot reconcile the absolute (cross-PR isolation). Transferable signal = the verify-row marginal/ratio, NOT the local absolute ms.
interpretation.overlap: propose is a SEPARATE call (outside execute_model). Clean control 413.76 TPS implies step ~8.46 ms < serial verify+draft 9.3 ms => propose is ~partially hidden. Current path is PARTIALLY overlapped (between fully-serial/central and fully-overlapped/optimistic).
interpretation.g_d_fork: no evidence of the optimistic free-rows regime; verify rows cost the central roofline amount. Realizing the optimistic g_d (step ~1.119-equiv) needs a verify||emit megakernel overlap that is NOT built.
interpretation.linear_deep_penalty: tps DROPS with deeper linear K (342->207->206->190) because E[T] does not improve while the step grows -> re-confirms a TREE (not deeper linear) is required to lift E[T].
